settings.label: Free shipping threshold (¥)
settings.info: Amount in yen for the cart drawer free-shipping progress bar.

settings.label: Member customer tag
settings.info: Logged-in customers with this tag see member pricing.

settings.label: GA4 measurement ID
settings.info: e.g. G-XXXXXXXXXX. Leave blank to disable Google Analytics 4.

settings.label: GTM container ID
settings.info: e.g. GTM-XXXXXXX. Leave blank to disable Google Tag Manager.

settings.label: Head scripts
settings.info: Pasted verbatim just before </head> (heatmap/pixel tags etc). Leave blank to disable.

settings.label: Body scripts
settings.info: Pasted verbatim just after <body> opens. Leave blank to disable.
